skills.name: Cassis Crista
skills.description: Equip the Cassis Crista and prepare for battle. Your Movement Speed and Evasion decrease, but your chance of resisting debuffs increases. If you are Stunned the duration is halved.
skills.stance: OneHandSword OneHandSwordShield OneHandSwordDagger OneHandSpearShield OneHandSpearDagger RapierAndShield RapierAndDagger
skills.effect_text:
Movement Speed decreases by CaptionRatio
Evasion decreases by CaptionRatio2 %
The chance of resisting debuff increases by 50%
Maximum Level: 1

skills.name: Frenzied Burst
skills.description: Perform a long leap forwards and attack the enemy.
skills.stance: OneHandSword OneHandSwordShield OneHandSwordDagger OneHandSpearShield OneHandSpearDagger RapierAndShield RapierAndDagger
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 8
Adds CaptionRatio % of the Shield's Physical Defense to Physical Attack
Targets: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Headbutt
skills.description: Butt the enemy with the head, causing them to turn around while damaging them. The attacked enemy is stunned by 50% chance. Apply as a double hit to the medium-sized enemies and Stun duration increases by 1 second when Cassis Crista is equipped.
skills.stance: OneHandSword OneHandSwordShield OneHandSwordDagger OneHandSpearShield OneHandSpearDagger RapierAndShield RapierAndDagger
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
[Stun] duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Scutum Hit
skills.description: Swings the shield to attack enemies in range nearby.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x4
Adds CaptionRatio % of the Shield's Physical Defense to Physical Attack
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR

skills.name: Shield Train
skills.description: Rush ahead with your shield and push enemies forward. Then, strike the ground with your shield to gather the enemies in front of you. Gathered enemies become temporarily unable to move.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
Adds CaptionRatio2 % of the Shield's Physical Defense to Physical Attack
Targets: CaptionRatio
Unable to move for 3 seconds

skills.name: Sprint
skills.description: Removes [Slow] debuff and momentarily increases your Movement Speed. Increased Movement Speed gradually returns to the original Movement Speed, and Stamina does not decrease by dash while the buff lasts.
skills.stance: OneHandSword OneHandSwordShield OneHandSwordDagger OneHandSwordArtefact OneHandSpearArtefact OneHandSpearShield OneHandSpearDagger RapierAndShield RapierAndDagger RapierAndArtefact
skills.effect_text:
Increases Movement Speed by CaptionRatio
Duration: 10 seconds
Dash does not consume STA

skills.name: Butterfly
skills.description: Use your shield and sword to attack multiple times. If the attack is accurate, shield's physical defense is added to the physical Attack proportionally.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 8
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
Minimum Critical Chance: 20%
Adds CaptionRatio % of the Shield's Physical Defense to Physical Attack

attributes.name: Shield Mastery: Block Specialty
attributes.description:
* Block increases by 0.75% per attribute level when equipping [Shield], and [Detect Loophole] buff is applied to yourself when succeeding in Block

* [Detect Loophole] : Accuracy and Block Penetration increases by 20% when attacking the enemy

attributes.name: Frenzied Burst: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Frenzied Burst] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Headbutt: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Headbutt] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Scutum Hit: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Scutum Hit] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Shield Train: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Shield Train] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Murmillo: Shield Attack
attributes.description:
* Instead of nullifying the shield's Defense/Minimum Block Chance, [Attribute level]*6% of Shield's physical defense is added to the Attack of [Scutum Hit] / [Shield Train] / [Butterfly] / [Frenzied Burst]

* When using the second slot, applied perfectly only when equipping 2 shields. Only half applied when equipping one

* (Ex: When the proportion of the Attack added is 6%, [Defense of first slot shield] * 3% + [Defense of second slot shield] * 3%)

attributes.name: Murmillo: Shield Attack
attributes.description:

* When using the second slot, applied perfectly only when equipping 2 shields. Only half applied when equipping one

attributes.name: [Arts] Cassis Crista: Gladiator
attributes.description:
* When 25% of your maximum HP or above is taken at once by physical damage, the damage received over that 25% is ignored, and the helmet is removed.

* Cooldown of 10 seconds applies after the helmet is removed

attributes.name: [Arts] Frenzied Burst: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Frenzied Burst] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Headbutt: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Headbutt] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Scutum Hit: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Scutum Hit] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Shield Train: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Shield Train] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Shield Train: Secondary Shock
attributes.description:
* Damages an enemy 3 times in a certain range per 0.5 seconds for 1.5 seconds after rushing to the [Shield train]

*Changes Overheat to 1 time

attributes.name: Sprint: Melee
attributes.description:
* The effect of increasing the movement speed disappears, and the duration becomes 3 seconds when using the Sprint. Immune to Knockback, Knockdown and [Slow][Immobility][Arrest]

* Cooldown increases by 10 seconds

attributes.name: Headbutt: Emperor's Bane
attributes.description:
* Grab your target and swing them in the air, applying Stun and Weak (Damage received +10%) on them.

* Head-butts an enemy and gives damage to enemies nearby by using the skill repeatedly.

* Damage decreases by 25%

* Applies as 4 consecutive hits against a medium-sized target when equipping [Cassis Crista]

* Duration: [2 seconds + (skill level x 0.3)] seconds

* Damage received decreases by 30% when skill is casting

Cooldown increases by 20 seconds, Overheat changes to 1 time

attributes.name: Butterfly: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Butterfly] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Butterfly: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Butterfly] by 1.25% per attribute level
